spec_match.rationale: Superb interactive state-machine mapping and code reference guide covering all standard Push subscription phases.

interactive.rationale: Outstanding interactive diagram and log simulator that lets the user walk every state and inspect corresponding service worker listener blocks.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Accurately explains how Chrome 138 prevents silent registration failures after permission recovery.

edge_cases.rationale: Provides great descriptions of failure scenarios but does not execute a live feature detection probe on page load.

references.rationale: The concept page now includes the required https://chromestatus.com/feature/5147683423256576 self-heal reference link.

design_system.rationale: Consistently relies on standard paper backgrounds, border outlines, and system fonts.

summary: The previous reference-only critique has been resolved: the concept page now carries the canonical ChromeStatus self-heal link required by the repository rules.
